mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follows (follower_id, followee_id) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followeeId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.password_hash, u.username, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.created_at FROM follows f JOIN users u ON u.id = f.follower_id WHERE f.followee_id = #{followeeId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT u.id, u.email, u.password_hash, u.username, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.created_at FROM follows f JOIN users u ON u.id = f.followee_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{followerId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE followee_id = #{followeeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId}
